title: crotalaria candicans
intro: Crotalaria candicans, a flowering plant native to tropical regions, is a member of the legume family (Fabaceae) and is also known as the "Silver Bush." Its medicinal properties make it a valuable plant for various health issues, including its use as a diuretic and to treat fever and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria candicans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
